message:
Running command: # Found it - fix SDC path in script
SDC_PATH="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.sdc"

# Also check what _SDC_IN normally is for step 32
grep "_SDC_IN\|PNR_SDC\|FALLBACK_SDC" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/_env.tcl | head -3
echo "---"
# Check if there's an SDC in the step 29 state_out that should be used
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/29-openroad-detailedplacement/state_out.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('SDC:', d.get('sdc'))
"
